title: Powiaty – granice administracyjne (PRG)
provider: Główny Urząd Geodezji i Kartografii (GUGiK) – Państwowy Rejestr Granic (PRG); SHP mirror: GIS Support sp. z o.o.
license_note: PRG boundary data is free public data under art. 40a ust. 2 pkt 1 of the Polish Geodetic and Cartographic Law (Prawo geodezyjne i kartograficzne); free for any use, including commercial, with source attribution.
attribution: Granice administracyjne: Państwowy Rejestr Granic (PRG), © GUGiK; kopia SHP: gis-support.pl; uproszczenie geometrii: MeteoLens.
redistribution_note: Redistribution of PRG-derived boundaries is allowed with source attribution. This file is a simplified derivative and must stay labelled as processed data in UI, screenshots, and exports.
update_cadence: PRG is updated continuously by GUGiK. This import uses the PRG snapshot with WERSJA_OD 2022 (GIS Support 2022 SHP package). Refresh by downloading a newer PRG export, re-running scripts/geometry/convert_prg_shapefiles.py, and re-importing.
known_limitations: Geometry simplified with Douglas-Peucker (tolerance 200 m), so small boundary slivers/gaps between neighbouring counties can occur; a 2022 snapshot, so later administrative boundary changes are not reflected; not suitable for legal or cadastral use.
dataset_version: PRG WERSJA_OD 2022; GIS Support SHP 2022-12-22; MeteoLens simplification 2026-07-04

review.notes: Official public PRG data via GIS Support SHP mirror; legal basis and attribution documented in docs/geometry/GEOMETRY_SOURCES.md and LEGAL_ATTRIBUTION.md.
